name: wapp-flow
description: WApp Flow — Universal WhatsApp Automation Platform

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --workspace=apps/api-gateway" "npm run dev --workspace=apps/messaging-service" "npm run dev --workspace=apps/automation-engine" "npm run dev --workspace=apps/ai-service" "npm run dev --workspace=apps/analytics-service" "npm run dev --workspace=apps/webhook-handler" "npm run dev --workspace=apps/dashboard"
